finding: No onboarding or guided first-trade experience for novice investors
recommendation: Add contextual tooltips, first-visit banner, default to Market + SGD

finding: Sell toggle accessible with 0 oz holdings -- error only at validation
recommendation: Disable Sell or show inline message when holdings = 0

finding: Currency selector introduces massive cognitive load with no explanation
recommendation: Default SGD, collapse behind 'Change currency' link

finding: No prefers-reduced-motion support despite extensive animations
recommendation: Add global @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rule

finding: Muted text contrast #717182 on #ececf0 fails WCAG AA at ~3.5:1
recommendation: Darken muted foreground to at least #5e5e6e

finding: Button/input height 36px below WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 minimum of 44px
recommendation: Increase min-heights to 44px for coarse pointers

finding: All 4 metal cards have equal visual weight -- no beginner guidance
recommendation: Add 'Most Popular' badge to Gold or 'New? Start with Gold' CTA

finding: Amount field label ambiguous -- spend amount vs metal quantity unclear
recommendation: Rename to 'I want to spend (SGD)' and show computed oz prominently

finding: No fee disclosure, no spread cost breakdown before confirmation
recommendation: Add cost breakdown: Metal price, Spread (0.5%), Total, Fees (S$0.00)

finding: Confirm button has no loading state -- direct navigation on click
recommendation: Add loading spinner with 'Processing...' and disable after first click

finding: Empty state CTA 'Start trading to build your portfolio' is vague
recommendation: Change to 'Buy your first precious metal' button linking to /trade/XAU

finding: Chart has no Y-axis labels, gridlines, or volume data
recommendation: Add Y-axis price labels, gridlines, label time buttons descriptively

finding: Metal tabs use expert codes (XAU, XPT) more prominently than names
recommendation: Show metal name first, code smaller: 'Gold (XAU)'

finding: Order ID is truncated UUID -- no receipt download option
recommendation: Display human-readable reference, add Download Receipt button

finding: Trade nav link goes directly to Gold with no intermediate page
recommendation: Make Trade a dropdown or remember last-traded metal

finding: No cross-metal comparison view -- must tab between 4 metals
recommendation: Add Compare Metals table: Price, Min Qty, Volatility, Best For

finding: Footer only has copyright -- no Help, Terms, Privacy, regulatory links
recommendation: Add standard footer links including regulatory information

finding: 8-row table on dashboard is too dense for novice users
recommendation: Show 3 simplified cards, reserve full table for Orders page

finding: Account dropdown shows full account numbers adding noise
recommendation: Simplify to 'Current Account -- S$50,000.00'

finding: No skip-navigation link for keyboard users
recommendation: Add visually hidden skip link: 'Skip to main content'

finding: 404 page has no search or suggested links
recommendation: Add suggested links (Dashboard, Trade, Products)
